cases.prompt: Get a codex review on my diff — I want an independent second opinion with a pass/fail gate.

assertions.text: Uses the codex review mode to run an independent diff review with a pass/fail gate.
Wraps the OpenAI Codex CLI rather than reviewing inline as Claude.
Produces an independent code review result the user can act on.

cases.prompt: 코덱스한테 이 코드 깨보라고 시켜줘. 적대적으로 챌린지 돌려.

assertions.text: Runs the adversarial challenge mode that actively tries to break the code.
Acts as the independent '200 IQ developer' second opinion separate from Claude's own view.
Produces adversarial challenge results showing what it could break.
